Off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion sought to be joined.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay This Case Pending Silicosis Cases Petition For Coordination; Declaration Of Andrea A. Lowe
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Defendant Caesarstone USA, Inc.'s motion to stay this case pending adjudication of the coordination petition is denied.

The statutes governing coordination vest the coordination judge with the power to stay the proceedings. CCP 404.5 provides that "Pending any determination of whether coordination is appropriate, the judge making that determination may stay any action being considered for, or affecting an action being considered for, coordination." Though section 404.5 does not deprive the court of the authority to stay proceedings, it evinces the Legislature's intent for the coordination judge to decide whether cases are stayed pre-coordination.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Joinder To Defendant And Cross-Complainant Caesarstone Usa, Inc.'S Motion To Stay This Case Pending Silicosis Actions Case Petition For Coordination
